topics.title: Overview / Purpose
topics.description: What Craft is, the gameplay and implementation goals described by the project, and the major systems that make up the client and server.
evidence_pack_hint: src/main.c top-level model structs and main initialization

topics.title: Setup, Build, and Run
topics.description: How Craft is built and run on supported platforms, how the C client is linked, and how the optional Python multiplayer server is started.
evidence_pack_hint: README.md install, compile, and server sections

topics.title: Gameplay, Controls, and Commands
topics.description: How user input drives movement, block editing, signs, chat, in-game commands, builder operations, hit testing, and collision behavior.
evidence: src/main.c input, command, block editing, hit-test, and movement code
evidence_pack_hint: src/main.c functions around hit_test, collide, parse_command, input callbacks, handle_movement

topics.title: World Generation and Chunks
topics.description: How Craft generates deterministic terrain, divides the world into chunks, stores chunk block maps, loads chunks, schedules worker computation, and manages dirty chunk geometry.
evidence_pack_hint: src/main.c chunk lifecycle and worker functions

topics.title: Rendering and Graphics Pipeline
topics.description: How Craft turns chunks, blocks, plants, signs, sky, text, and players into OpenGL buffers and shaders, including culling, lighting, transparency, and ambient occlusion.
evidence_pack_hint: README.md rendering, sky dome, and ambient occlusion sections

topics.title: Persistence, Database, and Cache
topics.description: How Craft persists world deltas, signs, lights, auth state, player state, chunk cache keys, and asynchronous SQLite writes through a ring queue.
evidence: README.md database and multiplayer caching sections
src/main.c block, sign, light, and mode switching functions

topics.title: Multiplayer Protocol and Server
topics.description: How the C client and Python server exchange line-based protocol messages for login, chunks, block changes, lights, signs, chat, player state, cache keys, and time.
evidence_pack_hint: src/main.c parse_buffer, login, request_chunk, online/offline commands
